title: node.rs: reply_echo_ipv6 doesn't validate packet length for echo fields
notes: Fix already present in node.rs:137 (length check added in vx09). Explicit bounds check prevents potential panic on malformed short ICMPv6 echo packets. Tests pass.
close_reason: Explicit length check added to reply_echo_ipv6 (already present in current main). Defense-in-depth against short ICMPv6 packets. git show confirms fix at node.rs:138.
